ol.li: Closure Pattern: Forward pass computes t = tanh(x), backward uses cached t
Numerical Guard: Saturate to ±1 for |x| > 20 to prevent overflow
Memory Efficiency: One cached value instead of recomputing expensive exp()

div.p: Tanh Definition: $$\tanh(x) = \frac{e^x - e^{-x}}{e^x + e^{-x}}$$ Alternative form: $$\tanh(x) = \frac{e^{2x} - 1}{e^{2x} + 1}$$
Express as quotient: Let $u = e^x - e^{-x}$ (numerator) Let $v = e^x + e^{-x}$ (denominator) $$\tanh(x) = \frac{u}{v}$$
Quotient Rule: $$\frac{d}{dx}\left(\frac{u}{v}\right) = \frac{v \cdot u' - u \cdot v'}{v^2}$$ Compute derivatives:
Substitute into quotient rule: $$\frac{d}{dx}\tanh(x) = \frac{v \cdot v - u \cdot u}{v^2}$$ $$= \frac{v^2 - u^2}{v^2}$$ $$= \frac{v^2}{v^2} - \frac{u^2}{v^2}$$
